items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement 'Outcome linkage to certification/completion status', but the provided evidence does not include any specific details or endpoints related to this requirement. The prior steps focus on other aspects of the saga lifecycle, such as customer sign-ups and booking processes, without addressing the specific need for outcome linkage. Therefore, it is not possible to confirm or identify any gaps regarding this requirement.
